title: Fishing Expansion
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8c1a4f9b4aa8642bacd61fc11e082ada065f347.png)
Adds lots of new fish into minecraft to explore for, these fish include-


**BOOMFISH**
> a creeper themed fish, it will blow up on contact!

**FLOPPER**
> based on the fortnite fish! will act just like every other fish

**SLURPFISH**
> once again, based on the fortnite fish. this glowing blue fish will restore health rather than hunger

**_CATFISH_**
> not the kind your thinking, this fish is litteratly a CAT fish. trust me.

**CATFISH**
> a swamp exclusive fish! can be cooked from its raw form to a better cooked on!

**GAR**
> another swamp exclusive! this long, snake like fish is fast and hostile. your not safe on shore as gar will wait for you to re-enter the water! if you kill it, its raw for can be used as a sword! you may also cook this fish for food. 

**ELECTRIC EEL**
> DO NOT TOUCH, the eels must be friends with Zeus! you **will** get struck if near!

**BATFISH**
> this fish spawns in dark waters, its small and glows orange. it is passive and adds a nice orange burst in the deep blue sea.

**ANGLER FISH**
> this dark see fish also glows, however, this small white glow is a trick as the angler is hostile and will attack you.

**STINGRAY**
>these ocean dwellers aren't hostile, as long as you don't attack!

**URCHIN**
> Check the sea floor for these black spiked friends! they dont move, but will hurt if you touch them.

**KOI FISH**
> one of the rarest fish, only spawns in cherry and lush caves!

--------------------------------

for more information, check out this video!
